about.subtitle: ABOUT US
about.title: DROGA PHYSIOTHERAPY SPECIALITY CLINIC
about.description: Droga Physiotherapy Specialty Clinic was established in 2015 in Addis Ababa by a group of health care professionals, who have an interest in developing the scientific background of physiotherapy in Ethiopia.

services.title:
Physiotherapy Examination 
 and Consultation
services.description: Comprehensive assessment of your physical condition, including medical history review, posture analysis, and functional movement screening to develop a personalized treatment plan.

services.title:
Manual 
 Therapy
services.description: Hands-on techniques used to mobilize joints, massage soft tissues, and manipulate muscles to reduce pain, improve flexibility, and restore normal movement patterns.

services.title:
Exercise & 
 Movement Therapy
services.description: Customized therapeutic exercise programs designed to strengthen muscles, improve range of motion, enhance stability, and correct biomechanical imbalances.

services.title:
Electro- Therapeutic 
 Modalities
services.description: Application of specialized therapies such as TENS, ultrasound, and electrical muscle stimulation to relieve pain, reduce inflammation, and accelerate tissue healing.

services.title:
Advanced 
 Procedures
services.description: State-of-the-art therapeutic interventions including shockwave therapy, laser therapy, and dry needling for targeted treatment of chronic pain and acute sports injuries.

services.title:
Complementary 
 Procedures
services.description: Integrative treatments such as cupping, taping, and acupuncture designed to support the primary rehabilitation plan and promote overall physical well-being.

testimonials.name: Ermiyas T.
testimonials.quote: Droga Physiotherapy Clinic gave me my life back. I came in with severe lower-back pain that had been affecting my work and sleep for months. The therapists took time to understand my condition, created a personalized treatment plan, and guided me through every step. After a few sessions, the improvement was unbelievable. I can now move freely and pain-free. Highly recommended!

testimonials.name: Aster B.
testimonials.quote: I am very impressed with the professionalism and care at Droga Physiotherapy Clinic. The team is friendly, knowledgeable, and truly dedicated to patient recovery. Their modern equipment and clean environment made every visit comfortable. I felt supported from my first consultation to my final session. This clinic is definitely the best choice for physiotherapy.

testimonials.name: Semira Mukhtar
testimonials.quote: As an athlete, I needed a physiotherapy clinic that understood sports injuries — and Droga Physiotherapy Clinic exceeded my expectations. They helped me recover from a knee injury and guided me through strengthening exercises that improved my performance. I’m now back on the field stronger than ever. Thank you to the entire Droga team for their outstanding care!

hero.subtitle: Droga Physiotherapy
hero.title:
Have questions about our
treatments, appointments?

faqs.question: How can you help my problem?
faqs.answer: We can help you by providing high quality physiotherapy care options by our expert physiotherapists. We use various therapeutic interventions to alleviate your pain and maximize your physical functionality. Such as; manual therapy, electrotherapy, therapeutic exercise and different therapeutic procedures. We implement highly evidence based therapy practice and high tech machineries.

faqs.question: How is your work process?
faqs.answer: First you need to book via online or get registered in person for the physiotherapy evaluation. After in person registration pre medical checkup will be conducted by senior nurses. The nurse will check all your vital signs; take your previous medical and medication history. Then a physiotherapist will do the physical assessment, identify your physical illness cause and develop individualized therapy plan. Then the number of expected therapy follow up days and frequency will be decided. Then you start your therapy after you settle the payment.

faqs.question: Do you give home therapy service?
faqs.answer: Currently No, We only have out patient service.

faqs.question: Do you give chiropractic service as well?
faqs.answer: We don’t give chiropractic service but we manage efficiently all conditions that a chiropractor does. Like, we adjust the spine and peripheral joints and we rehabilitate beyond just an adjustment.

faqs.question: Do you have MRI service alongside?
faqs.answer: No we don’t have but there are MRI centers nearby to our clinics.

faqs.question: Can I choose the gender of my therapist?( Male or Female)
faqs.answer: Sure we have both female and male therapist and you can choose upon registration.

article.understandingDesc: When dealing with this condition, it is critical to understand the underlying mechanics that lead to discomfort. Our evidence-based approach ensures that we not only address the symptoms but also the root cause. This involves a comprehensive assessment of your movement patterns, strength, and flexibility.
article.healingQuote: Healing is a matter of time, but it is sometimes also a matter of opportunity. Our physiotherapy approach focuses on unlocking your body's natural healing potential.
article.treatmentDesc: Treatment plans are highly individualized. We may utilize a combination of manual therapy, targeted therapeutic exercises, dry needling, and modalities such as ultrasound or electrical stimulation. The goal is always to restore function, improve mobility, and enhance your overall quality of life.
article.consistencyDesc: Consistency is key. While in-clinic sessions are essential, we also emphasize the importance of home exercise programs. By actively participating in your recovery process outside the clinic, you significantly improve your long-term outcomes and reduce the risk of recurrence.

noResults.desc: No articles found for this search.

articles.title: Chronic Pain Relief
articles.subtitle: The Role of Physiotherapy in Chronic Pain Relief
articles.content: Chronic pain affects millions worldwide. Our specialised therapists use evidence-based techniques—manual therapy, dry needling, and targeted exercise—to break the pain cycle and restore normal movement.

articles.title: Geriatric Therapy
articles.subtitle: How Geriatric Therapy Helps Seniors Stay Active & Independent
articles.content: Aging doesn't mean slowing down. Our geriatric rehabilitation programme is tailored for older adults, improving balance, strength, and confidence in daily activities.

articles.title: Sports Injury Recovery
articles.subtitle: Recover Faster. Perform Better.
articles.content: From sprained ankles to ACL tears, our sports physiotherapy specialists design progressive rehabilitation plans to get you back on the field stronger than ever.

articles.title: Posture Correction
articles.subtitle: Straighten Up: A Guide to Better Posture
articles.content: Poor posture is one of the leading causes of back and neck pain. Through targeted exercises and ergonomic guidance, we help you build lasting postural habits.

articles.title: Back Pain Relief Tips
articles.subtitle: Simple Daily Exercises to Manage Chronic Back Pain
articles.content: Discover practical, at-home exercises recommended by our physiotherapists to reduce chronic back pain and improve spinal mobility in just 15 minutes a day.

articles.title: Clubfoot Management
articles.subtitle: Post-Surgical Recovery Tips
articles.content: Early treatment plays a vital role in our children's healthy motor development. Pediatric therapy helps children achieve their full potential.

articles.title: Benefits of Pediatric Therapy
articles.subtitle: How Physiotherapy Helps Infants?
articles.content: Pediatric therapy helps children reach their full potential. From fine to gross motor skills, we develop them all.

hero.subtitle: Droga Physiotherapy
hero.title:
Wellness And Pre-Therapy
Tips For Daily Life

desk.title: Master Your Desk Posture
desk.content: Sitting for hours puts immense pressure on your spine. Keep your screen at eye level, shoulders relaxed, and lower back supported. Ensure your feet are flat on the floor to maintain blood circulation and reduce lumbar strain.

drive.title: Drive Pain-Free
drive.content: Adjust your seat so your knees are slightly bent. Keep your hands at 9 and 3 o'clock. Use a lumbar roll if your seat lacks support.

stretch.title: 3-Minute Stretch
stretch.content: Incorporate quick standing back extensions and neck gentle rolls every two hours.

eyes.title: The 20-20-20 Rule
eyes.content: Every 20 mins, look 20 feet away for 20 seconds. This prevents neck craning caused by focusing strictly on screens.

items.title: Ice vs. Heat
items.desc: Ice limits blood flow to reduce acute swelling. Heat promotes blood flow to relax muscles. Never use heat on a fresh injury.

items.title: Foam Rolling
items.desc: Release myofascial tightness in IT bands, calves, and upper back using slow, controlled pressure before and after workouts.

items.title: Epsom Salt Baths
items.desc: Magnesium sulfate absorbed through the skin helps relax overworked muscles and loosen stiff joints after long days.

items.title: Active Recovery
items.desc: Instead of total rest, try light walking, cycling, or swimming to promote nutrient-rich blood flow to recovering tissues.

items.title: The Wake-Up Stretch
items.desc: Before leaping out of bed, gently bring your knees to your chest to stretch the lower back. Roll to your side before sitting up to avoid spinal compression right in the morning.

items.title: The Desk Reset
items.desc: If you're desk-bound, stand up and walk around. Perform shoulder blade squeezes and chin tucks to counteract the modern 'forward-head' tech posture.

items.title: Hydration & Alignment
items.desc: Dehydrated spinal discs lose their cushioning capability. Drink water throughout the afternoon, and check your ergonomic chair settings.

items.title: Optimal Sleeping Positions
items.desc: Sleep on your back with a pillow under your knees, or on your side with a pillow between your legs. Avoid sleeping on your stomach, which twists the cervical spine.
